calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to obtain, file and serve Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is ordered off calenar and dissolved/dismissed per 8/14/2009 Order. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pltf'S Action For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery;
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
Defendant John Reeves' Motion to dismiss plaintiff's action for failure to comply with court order compelling discovery; request for further monetary sanctions granted:
1. The Court orders plaintiff's action dismissed for failure to participate in discovery and failure to comply with previous orders compelling discovery;
2. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Continued To Sep-24-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to obtain, file and serve Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is ordered continued to 9/24/2009 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Continued To Aug-06-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to obtain file and serve Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is ordered continued to 8/6/2009 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162. (212)

Notice And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tishgart, Esq., Attorney at Law, Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for PLAINTIFF MAXIMINA SANTIAGO. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-11-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Responses To Deft'S Discovery Requests For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant John Reeves' Motion to compel plaintiff's responses to defendant's discovery request, granted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Within five days of the date of service of this order, plaintiff shall service full, complete, and verified responses to defendant's form interrogatories (set one), and request for production of documents (set one);
c. Request for monetary sanctions in connection with this motion granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within 30 days of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Attendance And Testimony At Deposition And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Of $531.84 Against Pltf Only;
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant John Reeves' Motion for order compelling attendance and testimony at deposition granted:
a. Plaintiff shall appear, and provide testimony at deposition within ten days of the date of service of this order, at a date, time and place to be determined by defendant;
b. Request for monetary sanctions in connection with this motion granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within 30 days of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
